authority: local TaxKit repository writes and local checks only
outcome: One portable repository-local docs-maintainer skill owns documentation maintenance. docs-writer is retained only for public-copy wording after docs-maintainer selects the owner.

impactLedger.evidence: Material triggers and ordinary-change route now name docs-maintainer.
Local skill maps all owner classes and exact commands without global paths.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Skill retrieval proves no runtime behaviour.

impactLedger.evidence: Writer is public-copy-only with matching UI metadata; both relative mirrors resolve their canonical local skills.
impactLedger.nonClaim: No external agent installation is changed.

impactLedger.evidence: Design, review landing, each material slice and closeout invoke docs-maintainer.
Mechanical negative fixtures cover missing impact, competing owner, generated output, lifecycle, mirror and portability.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Fixtures do not prove fresh-worker performance.

impactLedger.evidence: No calculator implementation changes; the profile routes future changes to their source and consumer owners.
No SDK change; profile requires export-map, README and packed-consumer proof when affected.
impactLedger.nonClaim: No package or consumer proof run.

impactLedger.evidence: No API, generated OpenAPI, MDX, navigation or Fumadocs source change.
impactLedger.nonClaim: No API/docs runtime, SSR, hydration or deployment proof.

impactLedger.evidence: Only routing language changes; canonical owners remain current.

impactLedger.surface: commands, CI, versioning and release proof
impactLedger.evidence: No command, workflow, version, release or runbook behaviour change; skill routes future changes to their owners.
impactLedger.nonClaim: No release, publication, registry, provider or deployment operation.

impactLedger.evidence: Candidate records the bounded local slice and its nonclaims.
impactLedger.nonClaim: Candidate is not acceptance, Git publication or external evidence.

checks.command: quick_validate.py for docs-maintainer, docs-writer, prd-writer, prd-review and prd-implementer
checks.postcondition: All five repository-local skill packages are structurally valid.
16 tests and 125 assertions accepted singular ownership, mirrors/UI metadata, PRD routes, boundary compatibility and every HGI-208 negative fixture.
0 violations across 589 inspected paths; 120 maintainer and 62 public paths remained correctly classified.
568 text and 8 binary tracked paths passed checkout-portability policy.
Repository path/docs types and checks, Effect language-service check, lint, format, skill tests, Knip, production Knip and 23 typecheck/build tasks passed after the final profile/metadata hardening.
The complete local candidate patch has no whitespace errors.

scenarios.postcondition: The fresh worker selected rule/schema, package/public/architecture and consumer-proof owners without copying rule truth.
The fresh worker selected source/export maps, package/public examples and packed/downstream consumer proof while preserving Effect/client boundaries.
The fresh worker kept HTTP Schema authoritative, regenerated checked OpenAPI/Fumadocs owners and rejected hand-edited output or deployment inference.
The fresh worker required one strict addressable record and one-to-one owner-policy binding for the exact page and preserved independent draft navigation and availability nonclaims.
The fresh worker routed CI, versioning, runbook and bounded release-proof owners and refused publication/provider claims.
The fresh worker used only checked-in skill/profile/mirror/metadata/routes and named no personal or global dependency.

forwardTests.nonClaim: Fresh-context routing proves no product change, release, deployment, publication, registry/provider state or external consumer behaviour.

limitations: This local candidate does not prove fresh-worker behaviour; independent scenarios remain pending.
It does not establish deployment, SSR, hydration, publication, registry, provider state or consumer behaviour.
nonClaims: No release, registry, provider, deployment, public-site or external system is accessed or changed.
No generated or public/package implementation truth is copied into the skill.
rollback: Revert the docs-maintainer skill, mirror, writer narrowing, PRD routes, policy fixtures and candidate together.
nextTrigger: Run independent fresh-context scenarios and record their separate acceptance result.
